name: Cleverapply
notes: AI-powered enrollment intelligence suite for international student recruitment. Some sources list Pittsburgh PA, but majority including address records confirm Cleveland OH (2529 Detroit Ave).

name: Malachyte
notes: Real-time AI personalization platform for e-commerce (Shopify-first). Founded 2024 by ex-Spotify/Google team. HQ at 42-51 Hunter Street, Queens NY 11101 per bizprofile.net.

name: Gv
notes: GV is Google Ventures / Alphabet's venture capital arm, formerly Google Ventures (renamed 2015). HQ Mountain View CA, also has offices in SF, Boston, NYC, London.

name: Presentationmode
notes: Presentation coaching/training SaaS. Privacy policy mentions presence in SF and NYC. Listing SF as primary HQ but company appears to operate across both cities.

name: Ridge
notes: Ridge Ventures — early-stage enterprise software VC, formerly IDG Ventures USA. Founded 2007, $540M+ AUM. HQ San Francisco, secondary office in Austin TX.

name: Stanford
notes: Stanford University, located at 450 Jane Stanford Way, Stanford CA 94305. In Silicon Valley near Palo Alto. Industry labeled EdTech as closest fit for a university.

name: Vibebio
notes: Vibe Bio — community-driven biotech using DAO/blockchain to fund rare disease drug development. Founded 2022, raised $12M. HQ Boston MA.

name: Withkrew
notes: Krew — AI agents for credit servicing and delinquency management. TCPA/FDCPA compliant. PitchBook profile explicitly lists San Francisco as HQ city.

name: Recode
notes: Recode.ink — CI/CD for design systems, automates UI refactoring to fix design debt. Backed by Near Horizon VC. Founder Jeff Mahacek based in Irvine CA per LinkedIn; no separate HQ address found.

name: Subunit
notes: Subunit — Web3/onchain real estate governance protocol using DAO LLCs and tokenized property ownership. Registered address 100 N Howard St Ste R, Spokane WA 99201. Also has institutional arm Subunit Pro.

name: Legix
notes: Legix — AI-powered bookkeeping and client accounting services (CAS) software for accounting firms. Founded 2023, raised $150K. HQ Phoenix AZ per Crunchbase/ZoomInfo.

name: Ritesize
notes: RiteSize — AI-native B2B marketplace for trading recycled commodities globally, using AI for quality verification, logistics, and financing. HQ New York NY. Note: ritesize.co is a separate equity consulting company.
